text:
So, what does this mean?
1 We know how to design better knowledge work for humans, and AI Agents benefit from the same patterns.
2 Tools evolve to overcome ceilings, and we must ensure that agents know how to use the appropriate tool to avoid local minimas.
3 The right orchestration of search tasks can result in much better performance, as context is a finite resource.
